dashboard.label: 🛡️ SOC Threat Detection Dashboard
dashboard.description: Unified view of active alerts, top source IPs, and threat timeline — Manuka Sathvik

search.query: index=main sourcetype=linux_secure "Failed password" | stats count by src_ip, user | where count > 5 | stats count as total_alerts
index=main sourcetype=dns | stats count dc(query) as unique_domains by src_ip | where count > 100 AND unique_domains > 50 | stats count as total_alerts
index=main sourcetype=WinEventLog EventCode=4672 | stats count by Account_Name, src_ip | where count > 3 | stats count as total_alerts
index=main sourcetype=WinEventLog EventCode=4104 | search ScriptBlockText IN ("*-enc*","*bypass*","*DownloadString*","*IEX*","*Invoke-Expression*") | stats count as total_alerts

(index=main sourcetype=linux_secure "Failed password") OR (index=main sourcetype=dns) OR (index=main sourcetype=WinEventLog EventCode IN (4104,4672)) | eval alert_type=case( sourcetype="linux_secure", "Brute Force", sourcetype="dns", "DNS Anomaly", EventCode=4672, "Privilege Escalation", EventCode=4104, "Suspicious PowerShell", true(), "Other" ) | timechart count by alert_type span=1h

chart.title: 🌐 Top Source IPs by Alert Count

search.query: (index=main sourcetype=linux_secure "Failed password") OR (index=main sourcetype=access_combined status=401) | rex field=_raw "from (?P\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)" | stats count by src_ip | sort -count | head 10

index=main sourcetype=linux_secure "Failed password" | rex field=_raw "Failed password for (?:invalid user )?(?P\S+) from (?P\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)" | stats count by src_ip, user | where count > 5 | eval severity=if(count>20,"🔴 HIGH","🟡 MEDIUM") | sort -count | head 20 | table src_ip, user, count, severity | rename src_ip as "Source IP", user as "Target User", count as "Attempts", severity as "Severity"

index=main sourcetype=dns | stats count dc(query) as unique_domains by src_ip | where count > 100 AND unique_domains > 50 | eval ratio=round(unique_domains/count,2) | eval verdict=case(ratio>0.8,"🔴 Likely C2",ratio>0.5,"🟠 Suspicious",true(),"🟡 Review") | sort -count | table src_ip, count, unique_domains, ratio, verdict | rename src_ip as "Source IP", count as "Total Queries", unique_domains as "Unique Domains", ratio as "DGA Ratio", verdict as "Verdict"

index=main sourcetype=access_combined | stats count avg(bytes) as avg_bytes sum(bytes) as total_bytes by src_ip | where count > 200 | eval avg_kb=round(avg_bytes/1024,1) | eval total_mb=round(total_bytes/1048576,2) | eval risk=if(avg_bytes>500000,"🔴 High — Possible Exfil","🟡 Medium — High Volume") | sort -count | head 10 | table src_ip, count, avg_kb, total_mb, risk | rename src_ip as "Source IP", count as "Requests", avg_kb as "Avg KB", total_mb as "Total MB", risk as "Risk"

| makeresults | eval data="T1110|Brute Force|Credential Access|Active|linux_secure failed logins T1071.004|DNS C2|Command and Control|Active|DNS query volume + DGA ratio T1078|Valid Accounts|Privilege Escalation|Active|WinEvent 4672 sensitive privileges T1059.001|PowerShell|Execution|Active|WinEvent 4104 script block logging T1071.001|Web Protocols|Command and Control|Active|HTTP anomaly + exfil detection T1566|Phishing|Initial Access|Covered in Email Analyser repo|-" | makemv delim=" " data | mvexpand data | rex field=data "(?P[^|]+)\|(?P[^|]+)\|(?P[^|]+)\|(?P[^|]+)\|(?P.+)" | table technique, name, tactic, status, notes | rename technique as "Technique ID", name as "Name", tactic as "Tactic", status as "Status", notes as "Detection Notes"
